Document:
# Cooking
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Cooking"/]
## Cooking
Cooking turns raw Wasteland ingredients into meals that are safer, more filling, and usually more valuable than eating ingredients by themselves. Most recipes rely on a heat source plus basic meats, produce, grains, or scavenged pre-war food.
A cooking stove or kitchen grill is needed for most hot meals.
[bold]Cooking Stove[/bold] - Standard cooking equipment found in most settlements and kitchens.
[bold]Kitchen Grill[/bold] - Outdoor grill suitable for cooking meats and simple meals.
Wasteland creatures provide a wide range of raw meats. [bold]Do not eat raw meat[/bold] unless you have no other choice - always cook it first.
Brahmin Meat
Bighorner Meat
Radstag Meat
Radhog Meat
Pigrat Meat
Yaoguai Meat
Radscorpion Meat
Radchicken Meat
Gecko Meat
Fire Gecko Meat
Golden Gecko Meat
Iguana Meat
Mirelurk Claw Meat
Squirrel Meat
Plants grown by farmers or gathered from the Wasteland. They can be eaten raw, processed into extracts, or used in complete meals.
Carrot
Cabbage
Corn
Onion
Potato
Tomato
Apple
Prepared meals made at a cooking station. Your best everyday food source when a settlement has a working kitchen.
[bold]Meal[/bold] [bold]Type[/bold] [bold]Ribs[/bold] Meat dish [bold]Cuban Carp[/bold] Fish dish [bold]Omelette[/bold] Egg dish [bold]Fried Egg[/bold] Egg dish [bold]Enchiladas[/bold] Grain and meat [bold]Nachos[/bold] Grain and cheese [bold]Fries[/bold] Potato side [bold]Queso[/bold] Cheese dip [bold]Sashimi[/bold] Raw fish preparation [bold]Loaded Potato[/bold] Stuffed potato [bold]Fruit Salad[/bold] Fresh salad [bold]Herb Salad[/bold] Fresh salad [bold]Coleslaw[/bold] Fresh salad
Simple one-pot foods and grain dishes that stretch ingredients further than most plated meals.
Pea Soup
Boiled Rice
Rice Gumbo
Rice Pudding
Oatmeal
Require grain or flour, plus a reliable heat source.
Plain Bread
Cornbread
Banana Bread
Meat Roll
Radroll
Mutfruit Pie
Blackberry Pie
Meat Pie
Pre-war food can still be found throughout the Wasteland. It stores well and is useful when you need fast calories without cooking.
Blamco Mac & Cheese
Cram
Dandy Boy Apples
Fancy Lads Snack Cakes
Instamash
Pork & Beans
Dinki-Di
The full auto-generated list of food recipes is available in-game via the cooking tab of the crafting menu. Check the in-game guidebook under [bold]Cooking[/bold] for live recipe data.
